page.content: In the financial analysis of América Móvil for the period ending December 2023, various metrics are evaluated, showcasing its performance in comparison to other telecommunications companies in the Asia-Pacific region. América Móvil exhibits a P/E Ratio of 12.3, a Current Ratio of 1.5, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.4, a Return on Equity (ROE) of 8.5%, a Return on Assets (ROA) of 7.2%, a Dividend Yield of 3.0%, an EV/EBITDA of 15.4, and a Net Profit Margin of 15.4%. In comparison, T-Mobile has a P/E Ratio of 11.8, a Current Ratio of 1.8, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.5, an ROE of 9.1%, an ROA of 6.5%, a Dividend Yield of 2.5%, an EV/EBITDA of 14.2, and a Net Profit Margin of 14.2%. NTT Docomo shows a P/E Ratio of 10.5, a Current Ratio of 1.2, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.3, an ROE of 10.0%, an ROA of 5.5%, a Dividend Yield of 1.8%, an EV/EBITDA of 12.5, and a Net Profit Margin of 12.5%. China Mobile leads with a P/E Ratio of 15.0, a Current Ratio of 2.0, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.6, an ROE of 11.0%, an ROA of 8.0%, a Dividend Yield of 4.0%, an EV/EBITDA of 18.0, and a Net Profit Margin of 18.0%.

page.content: SK Telecom's metrics include a P/E Ratio of 13.5, a Current Ratio of 1.6, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.8, an ROE of 10.5%, an ROA of 7.8%, a Dividend Yield of 2.2%, an EV/EBITDA of 16.0, and a Net Profit Margin of 16.0%. The Total Sector has a P/E Ratio of 11.7, a Current Ratio of 1.6, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.5, an ROE of 9.2%, an ROA of 6.1%, a Dividend Yield of 2.1%, an EV/EBITDA of 14.0, and a Net Profit Margin of 14.0%. The Market Average is represented by a P/E Ratio of 11.1, a Current Ratio of 1.5, a Debt/Equity ratio of 0.4, an ROE of 8.8%, an ROA of 6.7%, a Dividend Yield of 2.3%, an EV/EBITDA of 13.5, and a Net Profit Margin of 13.5%.
